title: Adaptive Feature Selection with Evolutionary Strategies for Multi-Objective Classification
title_es: Selección adaptativa de características con estrategias evolutivas para clasificación multiobjetivo
description_es: Este trabajo propone un método adaptativo para la selección de características utilizando estrategias evolutivas en problemas de clasificación multiobjetivo.

publication.venue: 2024 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC)

abstract: Feature selection is critical for efficient classification in high-dimensional spaces. This paper introduces an adaptive evolutionary strategy that optimizes feature selection considering multiple classification objectives simultaneously.

citations.apa: Molina, M., & Herrera, F. (2024). Adaptive Feature Selection with Evolutionary Strategies for Multi-Objective Classification. In 2024 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC) (pp. 3105-3112). IEEE.
citations.mla: Molina, María, and Francisco Herrera. "Adaptive Feature Selection with Evolutionary Strategies for Multi-Objective Classification." 2024 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC), IEEE, 2024, pp. 3105-3112.
